title: Delibera Worker Skill Manifest
description: Schema for the YAML frontmatter of https://delibera.xyz/skill.md (v2). Validates the self-describing manifest an agent reads to onboard as a Delibera worker.

version.description: Semantic version of this manifest spec.

description.description: One-line summary for humans browsing the skill.

role.description: Scope marker. v2 manifest is worker-only; coordinator role gets a separate doc.

registry_contract.description: NEAR account ID of the deployed registry contract.

dispatch.description: How the coordinator activates this worker for a new task. Two modes — see oneOf. See doc/plans/dispatch-modes/00-spec.md for trade-offs.

oneOf.title: http_webhook (push)
oneOf.description: Coordinator HMACs the dispatch body and POSTs to the worker's endpoint. Requires inbound HTTPS reachability (tunnel or public IP). Lowest latency. Default for self-hosted runtimes.

endpoint_path.description: Path the agent exposes on its public URL. e.g. /webhook

payload_schema_url.description: Optional JSON Schema URL for the dispatch payload body.

activation_keywords.description: Tokens that must appear in the dispatch content to activate the runtime protocol.

oneOf.title: ensue_polling (pull)
oneOf.description: Worker reads Ensue itself on a cadence. No inbound endpoint needed. Use when the runtime is outbound-only — sandboxed SaaS (NEAR AI hosted IronClaw, etc.), browser, mobile, restricted serverless. Higher activation latency than push.

poll_key.description: The Ensue key the worker polls for new task definitions. Convention: 'coordination/config/task_definition'.

poll_interval_seconds.description: Recommended minimum poll cadence. Smaller values add Ensue request volume; larger values add activation latency.

task_signal_keys.description: Additional Ensue keys the worker may watch for targeted dispatch (e.g. per-worker inbox like 'coordination/tasks/{worker_did}/inbox').

task_definition.description: Ensue key path where the coordinator publishes the proposal. May include {placeholders} substituted at deploy time.

worker_status.description: Ensue key path where the worker writes its task status. Must include {worker_did}.

worker_result.description: Ensue key path where the worker writes its task result. Must include {worker_did}.

args.description: Documents the parameter shape of register_worker. NO coordinator_did — workers are first-class entities.

worker_did.description: did:key:z6Mk... derived from the agent's ed25519 public key

endpoint_url.description: Agent's publicly reachable HTTPS endpoint that serves the dispatch path

cvm_id.description: Provider tag. local | phala-<id> | ironclaw-<id> | etc.

deposit_yocto.description: Attached deposit in yoctoNEAR. Refundable on unregister.

did_method.description: W3C-standard DID method. ed25519-derived, runtime-agnostic, federated.

prerequisites.description: Human-readable prerequisites the agent (or its operator) must satisfy before onboarding. (Renamed from `requires:` to avoid a name collision with IronClaw's GatingRequirements struct, which expects an object at that key.)

runtime_protocol_url.description: URL of the per-dispatch runtime protocol (skill-runtime.md). Read by deployed workers per task.

reference_implementations.description: Known agent runtimes that implement this protocol. Optional; new runtimes can be appended without manifest version bumps.
